mapper.sql: id, name, slug, description, IFNULL(sort_order, 0) AS sort_order, IFNULL(is_enabled, 1) AS is_enabled, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dramas d WHERE d.category_id = c.id) AS drama_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM categories c WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT FROM categories c ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT FROM categories c
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories) AS total_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dramas WHERE category_id IS NOT NULL) AS dramas_linked_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dramas) AS total_dramas
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories (name, slug, description, sort_order, is_enabled) VALUES ( #{name}, #{slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, 0), IFNULL(#{isEnabled}, 1) )
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET name = #{name}, slug = #{slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_order = IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, 0), is_enabled = IFNULL(#{isEnabled}, 1), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
